plugins.name: telescope.nvim
plugins.description_zh: 高度可擴展的模糊搜尋器，可搜尋檔案、文字、buffer、git 等一切
plugins.description_en: Highly extensible fuzzy finder over lists — files, grep, buffers, git, and more
plugins.author: nvim-telescope

plugins.name: harpoon
plugins.description_zh: 快速標記並在常用檔案間瞬間切換
plugins.description_en: Mark and instantly navigate between frequently used files
plugins.author: ThePrimeagen

plugins.name: neo-tree.nvim
plugins.description_zh: 現代化的檔案樹瀏覽器，支援 git 狀態顯示與檔案操作
plugins.description_en: Modern file tree browser with git status and file operations
plugins.author: nvim-neo-tree

plugins.name: mini.surround
plugins.description_zh: 快速新增、刪除、替換環繞符號（引號、括號等）
plugins.description_en: Fast surround actions — add, delete, replace surrounding characters
plugins.author: echasnovski

plugins.name: blink.cmp
plugins.description_zh: 高效能的自動補全引擎，支援 LSP 與多種來源
plugins.description_en: High-performance completion engine with LSP and multiple sources
plugins.author: Saghen

plugins.name: obsidian.nvim
plugins.description_zh: 在 Neovim 中操作 Obsidian vault，支援筆記、搜尋、每日記錄
plugins.description_en: Interact with Obsidian vaults in Neovim — notes, search, daily logs
plugins.author: obsidian-nvim

plugins.name: flash.nvim
plugins.description_zh: 閃電般的光標跳躍，輸入少量字元即可精準定位
plugins.description_en: Lightning-fast cursor navigation with minimal keystrokes
plugins.author: folke

plugins.name: which-key.nvim
plugins.description_zh: 按鍵後顯示可用的後續按鍵與說明，幫助記憶快捷鍵
plugins.description_en: Displays available keybindings in popup after pressing a key
plugins.author: folke

plugins.name: gitsigns.nvim
plugins.description_zh: 在行號旁顯示 git 變更標記，支援 hunk 操作與 blame
plugins.description_en: Git decorations — inline change signs, hunk actions, and blame
plugins.author: lewis6991

plugins.name: trouble.nvim
plugins.description_zh: 優雅的診斷列表，集中顯示錯誤、警告與 TODO
plugins.description_en: Pretty diagnostics list for errors, warnings, and TODOs
plugins.author: folke

plugins.name: todo-comments.nvim
plugins.description_zh: 高亮並搜尋程式碼中的 TODO、FIXME、HACK 等註解
plugins.description_en: Highlight and search TODO, FIXME, HACK comments in code
plugins.author: folke

plugins.name: conform.nvim
plugins.description_zh: 輕量級格式化工具管理器，支援多種語言的自動格式化
plugins.description_en: Lightweight formatter manager with support for multiple languages
plugins.author: stevearc

plugins.name: noice.nvim
plugins.description_zh: 重新設計 Neovim 的訊息、命令列與彈出通知介面
plugins.description_en: Replaces messages, cmdline, and popupmenu UI with modern design
plugins.author: folke

plugins.name: snacks.nvim
plugins.description_zh: 一系列實用小工具集合 — 通知、終端、儀表板等
plugins.description_en: Collection of small utilities — notifications, terminal, dashboard, and more
plugins.author: folke
